meaning: n.荒地,未开垦地,废墟,(生活方式等的)贫乏
examples: The mid 1970s are seen as a cultural wasteland for rock music.
The pollution has already turned vast areas into a wasteland.
From an airplane over a hilly wasteland a scientist sent back by radio one word, "Uranium".
Brink, like other recovery workers, used his hands to scour through a wasteland of debris.
So, I think Wasteland further convinced me of the power of transparency in communication.
